# drawsBackground

**Instance Property**

A Boolean that indicates whether the web view draws a background.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor var drawsBackground: Bool { get set }
```

## Discussion

If [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true], a default background is drawn; if [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false], it is not.

## Drawing

- **shouldUpdateWhileOffscreen**: A Boolean that inidicates whether the web view should update even when it is not in a window that is currently visible.
